entry.title: why unassigned GL accounts are showing in Financial statements report under transaction code-F.01
entry.content: I have created new FSVs to split two different statement like balance sheet statement & P & L statement seperately, when i execute F.01 transaction, its showing revenue gl accounts and expenses accounts in Balance sheet statement? I make sure that i never assigned these GL accounts in my FSV (balance sheet statement). From where these gl are coming in F.01 screen? i am confusing where is the issue? what is the reason to show these gl in balance sheet account.

entry.title: Re: CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY using RAP ( Unmanaged )

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE copy
entry.content: The 11th crime of Top 10 ABAP crimes 😎

entry.title: Material requirements are transferred despite delivery block or credit block
entry.content:
It is not possible to block a sales order and prevent the corresponding transfer of requirements. 

The material requirement must not be transferred to the sales requirements list.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Material requirements are transferred despite deliver...
entry.content:
It is standard system design that the delivery or the credit block does not prevent the transfer of requirements.

As a workaround, set the "Fixed Date & Quantity" indicator to prevent the transfer. When the user has set the correct delivery block on the header level the system will reset the confirmed quantity when saving the sales document. If the "Fixed Date & Quantity" indicator is set additionally, system will not transfer anything to the Sales Material Requirements.

entry.title: Get documents from TOAHR for specific PERNR
entry.content:
Hi,
We got the task at hand to export every document for a specific personnel number (pernr) from the TOAHR.
The export works fine.
The issue at the moment is to link the personnel number (pernr) to the specific document.
With SAP_OBJECT = PREL it's quite easy since the first eight numbers of the OBJECT_ID are the personnel number (pernr).
But for other SAP_OBJECT values like TAXCERPYDE or else, it doesnt seem like there is a personnel number (pernr) in the OBJECT_ID.

Since I couldn't find any mapping table that will link the pernr to the document id, is there a way to link documents to a personnel number?

entry.title: How Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP.
entry.content: Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP. They are triggered from production orders.

entry.title: Re: I created the SAP GUI AI Agent
entry.content:
Interesting. - Did I get this correctly: You didn't use recorded scripts in order to retrain the LLM model? Would it be possible the retrain the model with the help of recorded scripts in order to succeed in more specific situations, e.g if one wants to perform a series of postings automatically or in order to perform automated tests?

Thanks and regards,

Thomas

So, we have to work on it with the aim that new contract operations have this information from the creation time, and try to fill this information for existing contracts.

Any recommendation about it, will be very helpful.

Cheers,

Christian.

entry.title: Re: why do we have four quarter release updates in road map
entry.content:
Hello Jerry,

You also get new features via continuous delivery. They are not enabled by default till the next release, but can be activated. You can find more info on this e. g. here: https://me.sap.com/roadmapviewer/group/658F507A-D6F5-4B78-9EE1-0300C5F1E40F/roadmap/IMPS4HANACLDENMGMT:901B0E6D3F501EE6ABB4713604755B4A/node/FA163EAF25B21EEBBF8F673E693B016A/FA163E6071AE1EEC91DE747E9F6556FA

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Saved SAP Systems in VS Code using SAP Fiori tools

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
entry.content:
Hi @Jonas9,

Just another quick question. :).
I am adding some error handeling in the inbound event to SAP(using the consumption model). What we would like to accomplish is that when a error arises that the event is put back to SAP AEM. On the AEM side we have the retry mechanisme set to one and also allocated an DMQ to the queue. 
We would aspect that the message would be put on the DMQ. But this is not the case. You can see it in the event monitor as failed, which is nice. But sadly it is not put on any DMQ. 
Have you got any idea if this is even possible. Or should you create a outbound message for this requirement.

Thanks in advanced Erik

entry.title: Re: Could not read working days information from TFACS ta...
Re: Could not read working days information from TFACS ta...
Re: Could not read working days information from TFACS ta...
entry.content: I had the same issue and sharing the view with the other spaces did not work for me. However creating a new TFACS-view (that uses the TFACS-table shared to this view) in the space where the calculation is done solved the probleme for me. You can find additional information here:https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3396583

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in Table Default Number...
entry.content:
@DBalinski 

Couple of Options.

  • If you want to globally set the scale for the measure you could do it in measure configuration. 

    This is generally not advisable as you might have a mix of financial and statistical numbers with varied scaling requirements. but if it is  universal scaling you can set it here.

  • Other option is to apply the format in Excel table and disable the option of Applying the default format.

    If you have model with both measure and accounts you might have to check the structure priority in model preference to know from where the scale and format is being picked up. 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Kyma APIRule v2alpha1: MaxAge default causing an erro...
entry.content:
Ultimately, this seemed to be an edge case caused by the fact that we hadn't yet defined a CORS policy for this APIRule in the v1 structure.

What was ultimately successful for us to move to a v2alpha1 rule in our setup was:

  • Update apiVersion to v2alpha1
  • Change host to hosts and make into an array
  • Add namespace to the service object
  • Update path from /.* to /* -- this was a bit of a surprise but the error messages were helpful enough.
  • Add noAuth = true
  • Add a corsPolicy object

We could choose to add a corsPolicy object in our v1 resources or as part of v2. I extracted a default policy and applied that in our Terraform while moving to v2alpha1.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud, what is the solution/process for Excise and Duty calculations?
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I'm working with a spirits distiller/manufacturer in S/4HANA Public Cloud. They have both bonded and unbonded stock.

What is the excise and duty calculation process in S/4HANA Public Cloud to accurately calculate the tax and report it to UK HMRC government body?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Roadmap available in CALM but not in Roadmap Viewer?
entry.content:
Hi Karola,

This one?

Roadmap Viewer - SAP for Me

 

 

Rgs

Henric

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP, Kyma runtime: APIRule migration - noAuth and jwt handlers
entry.content:
Worth noting for Terraform users that if you're updating your resource in place, it will remove the APIRule v1beta1 prior to adding the APIRule v2alpha1, which does result in downtime, because it's not the gateway controller in charge at that point (personally we were OK with this and aware of it, but thought others may not be).

Also worth noting that if you haven't defined a CORS policy in your v1beta1 resource in terraform, you may need to add it upon upgrading to v2alpha1, or see an error around maxAge. See https://github.com/kyma-project/api-gateway/issues/1646

 

(These notes are based on our very specific upgrade scenario and may not apply to everyone. Just sharing them in case they are helpful to someone else.)

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Allocation Step - Planning Stan...
entry.content:
@12B32810-E375- 

This was a part of the product strategy when they migrated the Allocations to be part of Data Action.

There is an existing Influence request for this which you should upvote. Although the request has been categorized as not planned due to the product strategy.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/324339

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: git bash commands for Windows not working.
entry.content: it works for me, thanks

entry.title: Re: How Disable Purchase requisition creation when a material is on a BOM but not planned by MRP.
entry.content: Hello, it depends on many parameters. In the technical list, there is the possibility to open automatically when the RC is opened and when the MPR is run. However, there is also the issue of the material type in the material master, such as the supply type or the item category in the technical list.

entry.title: MIRO - Permitir alfanumérico na referência (RBKP-XBLNR)
entry.content:
Prezados,

Temos um processo em que o fornecedor usa um código alfanumérico como número da fatura (por exemplo, "D0DBCD"). Portanto, não é possível lançar a MIRO porque o campo "Referência" (RBKP-XBLNR) não aceita letras além de números. Quando tentamos, recebemos a mensagem de erro J1B_NFE032 (Doc. No. pode conter apenas dígitos; o número do documento D0DBCD contém outros caracteres).

Tentei alterar a característica da mensagem para warning mas não foi possível pois se trata de hard code. Por favor, sabem informar se há alguma EXIT ou uma maneira que possamos usar para tornar possível inserir valores alfanuméricos para uma determinada categoria de NF? Precisamos que o campo XBLNR aceite caracteres alfanuméricos e, consequentemente, migre para a Nota Fiscal (J_1BNFDOC-NFNUM).

Desde já agradeço o apoio!

Alexandre Verdério

entry.title: Cannot use the capabilities of Integration Suite in the trial account
entry.content:
Hi, 

I followed the step by step procedure to setup Integration Suite Trial account. 

But unfortunately , I am not able to move forward after the step 3.

1. Enter your trial account -> Success

2. Subscribe to the Integration suite services -> sucess

3. Activate the capabilities - > success

4. Assign roles and create service instances using booster -> Failed

This always gives me the below error when I try to use the enable integration suite booster though there are valid subscriptions

Roles are also assigned correctly

Capabilities are added correctly, but these capabilities are unuse. Nothing happens clicking on any capability nor I could see anything under Home as it should be in the below screen shot from the blog with the verify capability step.

 

                 

I tried to clear cache and logout , login multiple times and yet the issue is still the same. 

Can anyone help to resolve this and move forward?

entry.title: Mid-year Migration of AUC movements
entry.content:
Hello experts!

please, need your help.

The requirement: to do the migration of AUC movements (from the beginning of the year till May).

AUC are integrated with PS - so the beginning balance will be generated when WBS is released.

I tried to use the Fixed asset template for AUC movements migration - not success. 

This article didn't help as well: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/migration-cockpit-ltmc-2-...

 

Please advise how to accomplish it in the S4 Public Cloud

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Can I give my own order number to a hybris order or s...
entry.content:
Hi,

2 ways to do this : 

1. If your external system has a sequence you can create that sequence using the keygenerator in hybris.

de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.keygenerator.impl.PersistentKeyGenerator
keygen.ordernumber.code.name=yourOrderNumberName
keygen.ordernumber.code.digits=8
keygen.ordernumber.code.start=30000000
keygen.ordernumber.code.type=numeric
keygen.ordernumber.code.template=$
 
2. You can write the order prepare interceptor to set the code specifically.

entry.title: Re: How to set role restriction in the Manage Project Demand
entry.content: Add a note for users of "Manage Project Demand" app: after checking with the development, the role restrictions were not implemented in this app. There is no plan when it will be implemented.

entry.title: Re: Sales KIT
entry.content: It is not clear on your statement that 100 combinations would be there.  Is it that the same material code A, A1, A2 & A3  for all 100 combinations ?  I doubt either you narrated the Business requirement incorrectly or master data is not set properly.  If it is going to be same material codes A as a Header and A1 to A3 are sub components, in what way, they are different so that you need to have 100 combinations ?  Have you explored Variant Configuration ? Or, have the required different parameters in Classification tab of material master and based on that you can have your pricing

entry.title: Appl.Object :there is currently no visible screen in screen sequence FS0001
entry.content:
Even after maintaining the applications in BUS1. It's giving the error:

Appl.Object :there is currently no visible screen in screen sequence FS0001

Message No. R1858

entry.title: Re: MIRO - Permitir alfanumérico na referência (RBKP-XBLNR)
entry.content: Check 1675999 - Error 8B 236 when posting a Credit Memo in transaction code MIRO or cancelling an Invoice document in transaction code MR8M

entry.title: Re: Could not generate the XML stream caused by: com.c Message no. ECPAO_IN_QUERY000
entry.content:
check SMICM and log.

There will be in same time as error generated in SLG1. In my case it was 

[Thr 139920230823680] *** ERROR => request payload too big (chunked data) (icm/HTTP/max_request_size_KB=102400)

{00901723}

 

{root-id=37C8B0EAA2AD1EDFB8DBD6779D77ED27} [http_plg.c 2550] [ICMSHTTPCHUNKEDPAYLOADTOOBIG]
[Thr 139920230823680] HTTP_NORMAL T83_U16157_M0, 000, , xx.x.x.x, time=13:55:41, W44, program=SAPMHTTP, normal priority, memory=0, tasks=0, appl info=P=/sap/bc/srt/scs/sap/eemasterdataandorgassbndlreq , tcode=
[Thr 139920230823680] DTRACE(144/136995/1): {root-id=37C8B0EAA2AD1EDFB8DBD6779D77ED27}

from this error it ease just to adjust paramater to higher size. after that integration start working as usual.

BR

entry.title: Purchase the same material from multiple suppliers Rounding off qty based on Vendor in PO
entry.content:
HI

Plant 1000 has material 45001 available. It will purchase the same material from multiple suppliers, but the PO quantity will be rounded based on the vendor's qty.

example :

Material 45001 purchase from Vendor 7777 Min qty 67 Max qty 2068 Round should be 67
Material 45001 purchase from Vendor 8888 Min qty 43 Max qty 204 Round should be 43
Material 45001 purchase from Vendor 6666 Min qty 35 Max qty 35 Round should be 65
Material 45001 purchase from Vendor 9999 Min qty 65 Max qty 2860 Round should be 65

Through OWD1 not suppose to create multiple Rounding Profile for each vendor, bcz Material and vendor combinations are more than 1000.

Material qty round off based on supplier through Static rounding Profile not possible, is their way to achieve this

 

Thanks

entry.title: do you know all about the 5-Steps model of IFRS15/USGAP regularities?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Integrating Revenue Accounting and Reporting with SAP BRIM learning journey.

Overview
This course provides an overview of the SAP S/4 BRIM Integration into SAP S/4 HANA Revenue Accounting and Reporting. 
The training explains the necessity for the additional subledger Revenue Accounting and Reporting. 5-Steps model of IFRS15/USGAP regularities is taught.

Learning objectives
This course will prepare to:

  • Know subscription and consumption business examples 
  • Recognize the relevance of IFRS 15 for different business bases
  • Explore E2E BRIM-RAR process flow
  • Explain BRIM Inbound Processes into RAR

Prerequisites
Essential:

  • Basic understanding of BRIM and RAR Processes

Recommended:

  • Discovering the capabilities of SAP Solutions for Quote-to-Cash Management private cloud (BRIM) for Solution Architects

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Should a rule also be created for outgoing payment files?
entry.content:
It's an ISO20022 Bank Statement

Regards,

Nanno

entry.title: Is there a way to get the values of cells via scripting?
entry.content:
The user would like to be able to show a message on the following conditions (only if value and quantity is not filled):

  • price is 0,
  • price is blank,
  • price is negative or becomes +/-50% more than historical price.

We tried using getSelections() but only dimensions are available.

Is it possible to get measure values via scripting to enable a check as mentioned above?

entry.content:
Hi tomas_homola ,

Can you please check the ReportLayout Object Members?

There is a member (property) named as 'Name' which sets or returns the Document's Name value.

Field name: DocName

Does it help?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Payment Wizard schedule

Hi Experts,

How do I get the scheduled payment run to work in Payment Wizard?

I tried scheduling a payment run on a specific date and time, but it didn't execute/

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Change Management in SAP S/4HANA-Transformationen: Erkenntnisse aus meiner Masterarbeit
entry.content:
Vielen Dank für das Feedback, Thomas. Es freut mich, dass sich meine Erkenntnisse mit den Erfahrungen der Community decken. Du hast recht – jede Veränderung ist einzigartig, doch immer wieder zeigen sich Muster, die über Erfolg oder Misserfolg entscheiden. Ein durchdachtes Change Management ist kein "nice-to-have", sondern ein essenzieller Erfolgsfaktor für Veränderungen. Unternehmen, die diesen Aspekt strategisch angehen, vermeiden teure Widerstände und sorgen für eine nachhaltige Implementierung.

Ich freue mich auf den weiteren Austausch! Schönen Tag wünsche ich Euch allen noch

entry.title: Re: Using default connection string in production SAP B1
entry.content: @williamwachholz Hi, the second extension would do things like responding to certain events in some document forms or creating extra menus (that is why a connection string is needed to create his Application object, but the first extension consumes the connection that comes with the arguments and trying to use it again in the second extension will fail and launch an exception). Best regards.

entry.content:

Maybe you can help me, I would really appreciate it.

entry.title: How to calculate depreciation as per Income Tax act for India Business in SAP Public cloud.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are facing issue while calculating depreciation as per Income tax Act for India Business.

Which depreciation key should be there for the asset master to compute depreciation as per Income Tax Act in the SAP public cloud as by default it is as per Useful Life of Fixed Assets.

entry.title: Data loading from SAP ECC to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently working on DWH and the landscape is SAP ECC EHP8 and Datasphere without BW Bridge (because of transition to S/4HANA in near future).

I need to get data from some tables which is big enough to be replicated or persisted every day. Those tables  have "Creation date" and "Change date" fields, so I added them as remote table and created view to get only new values something like delta by date in datasource. But I found out that function in filter (like "Creation date" = CURRENT_DATE()) isn't pushed to the source system, so Datasphere get all the data from table and filter it inside itself.

I thought about custom datasources and replication flow, but it should have only one date field as delta, and I have 2 of them (because "Change date" can be empty). Another idea is to create in custom FM-based datasource and add it in dataflow. FM will have the next logic: if request contain Creation/Change date - use it, if they are empty - use current date.

Maybe there is more elegant way to solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Memories of the Newtown Square Campus
entry.content:
Seems this post is slowly becoming a way to remember lost friends and family. First, there was Marie Gazzara. Now it's my dad, who was laid to rest yesterday. 

NSQ old-timers might recognize my dad from when he ran campus security. I mention that at length in the post above.

I'm glad that he and I got to listen to the Eagles win the NFC championship on January 26th (even though Penn State was his favorite team).

entry.title: SAP Community Call for ALM
entry.content:
The free monthly webinar provides everything you need to know about SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) offerings. Get the latest news directly from SAP's topic experts!

With the monthly SAP Community Call for ALM, you have the chance to stay updated about what's going on with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Focused Run.

For slides and recordings click here.

Link to register is coming soon!

Thanks for the explanation. Here why an delivery is getting created while doing goods receipt for production order? Isnt the SLOC in production is IM managed?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Condition Contract Settlement error: Tax code via price determination cannot be determined.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I created a purchasing condition contract using 0PI3 type and only during final settlement I am getting error "Tax code via price determination cannot be determined". I have already maintained condition RET0 and RETX but still getting error. Not getting any error during delta settlement. 

Can you please help.

entry.title: Re: why does Fiori LeaveRequets -Onbehalf function conver...
entry.content: @masa_139 Thank you very much for your Time and Input. After lot of debugging (starting the Instance as a Employee and then with Onbehalf-Function), I found that both looks very similar except during Onbehalf function it calls a custom body IF_EX_PT_ABS_REQ~AUTH_CHECK_AND_ANONYMIZE_DATA where data is anonymized by removing Subtyp, Enddate, Begindate etc which changes the “uni-request” After this a function UNPACK_REQUEST_LIST is called, where we can see difference in Status Texts and many Null parameters in Onbehalf Instance. So we removed Anonymizing function for Approver. Now its working as expected.

entry.title: SAP Community Call for ALM
entry.content:
The free monthly webinar provides everything you need to know about SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) offerings. Get the latest news directly from SAP's topic experts!

With the monthly SAP Community Call for ALM, you have the chance to stay updated about what's going on with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Focused Run.

entry.title: Determination of payment terms in Condition Contract?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to use payment terms for rebate condition contracts. When trying to create the condition contract in WCOCO, the payment terms are not getting determined, even if these are already maintained in the customer master (KNVV and KNB1 tables). Does anyone know why the automatic determination of payment terms is not happening?

Thank you,

Roberto

entry.title: Mastering Day 2 Operations in SAP BTP Webcast Series
entry.content:
Together with the Global User Groups Organization, I had the pleasure to organize a new webcast series for members of SAP User Groups. The series is planned to start end of February and will cover twelve engaging sessions around "Mastering Day 2 Operations in SAP BTP" - thanks a lot to all the SAP colleagues that are contributing and making this event possible!

If you wonder what "day 2" means in this context - it is just following a way to describe the typical lifecycle in IT:

  • You start on day 0 with planning your architecture, selecting your toolchain (such as for CI/CD) and considering security requirements.
  • On day 1, you realize your solution - that is, deploy or instantiate cloud infrastructure, implement and propagate your custom app, configure it, and so on.
  • And finally, on day 2, you then make sure everything runs as expected - that is, with the right availability, performance, and features, considering security and compliance, and trying to eliminate manual efforts wherever you can.

Accordingly, we will cover sessions from the following categories in our webcast series: what you have to do to administrate and operate the platform (incl. how you can reduce your efforts with automation), how to manage the lifecycle of your custom apps (incl. observability), and how to make sure you stick to security recommendations and manage access to your applications.

Overview of categories around Day 2 Operations

We will start with the following sessions:

  • Feb-20 - Optimizing Day 2 Operations for Your SAP BTP Apps: Overview session for the Expert and Beginner
    This session will provide an introduction into the topic and a more detailed overview of the whole series, which shall allow you to plan the upcoming weeks
  • Feb-25 - SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP
    SAP Cloud ALM is the central operations platform also for SAP BTP and with this, plays an important role when it comes to operate your scenarios on SAP BTP - get an introduction to its monitoring capabilities (incl. OpenTelemetry) and learn more about SAP's vision for RISE operations and Clean Core Dashboards
  • Mar-11 - Terraform provider for SAP BTP – Real world setup scenario
    Learn about Infrastructure as Code and the Terraform provider for SAP BTP, incl. tangible examples and what to consider to set it up
  • Mar-20 - Survive brownfield Terraform projects with Terraform Exporter for SAP BTP
    One obstacle in the Terraform journey is how to get existing infrastructure under the management of the automation - in this session, learn what SAP is offering to lower this entry barrier, to give you a quick start in brownfield scenarios
  • Mar-27 - Observe your SAP BTP apps at depth via SAP Cloud Logging
    Learn about the analytical and alerting capabilities of SAP Cloud Logging and how to instrument your SAP BTP apps, for their detailed observation based on logs, metrics, and traces
  • Apr-03 - SAP BTP Operations Automation with SAP Cloud ALM
    Understand how SAP Cloud ALM works together with SAP BTP tools like the SAP Automation Pilot to enhance the operational efficiency and reliability across your entire landscape
  • Apr-10 - Exploring SAP Automation Pilot: Kickstart your ops automation
    Get an overview of SAP Automation Pilot and discover how it empowers technical teams with powerful automation capabilities - incl. a detailed hands-on demo on how to build operational commands

In the upcoming weeks, we will then come up with further dates for webinars around the following topics:

  • Enhanced remediation actions for your SAP HANA Cloud with SAP Automation Pilot
    Explore how SAP Automation Pilot simplifies and accelerates SAP HANA Cloud remediation processes by automating corrective and troubleshooting actions - based on real-world use cases
  • Inspiring technical ops automations with SAP Automation Pilot
    Explore further automation use cases, such as automated API checks for your solutions, Cloud Foundry app remediation actions, and seamless integration with ticketing management systems like Jira - as inspiration on how to further streamline your IT operations
  • SAP BTP High Availability/Disaster Recovery (HA/DR): Overview and Roadmap
    SAP BTP plays a central and important role in your company and your IT landscape, making it crucial that the platform is reliable and that appropriate mechanisms are implemented for high availability and recovery in the event of a disaster - learn which mechanisms are in place today, which SLAs apply and what is planned on the HA/DR roadmap
  • Best practices to enable Identify and Access Management
    Identity and access management is a crucial aspect of any IT architecture - explore the concepts and best practices for SAP Cloud Identity Services to fully leverage corresponding aspects within your landscape
  • Secure configuration for your SAP BTP services: An overview of SAP Security Recommendations
    Gain insights and guidance from the growing list of SAP BTP security recommendations, such as around user authentication and the storage of audit logs

All the topics listed above will be offered as live sessions held by the actual experts (again, a big THANK YOU to the colleagues). Of course, we also plan to offer recordings, in case you should not be able to join all sessions - but use the opportunity to bring up your questions in the Q&A parts of the live sessions! 

To register, go to the events Web page hosted by the Global User Groups Organization, click Register in the top-right corner and select "Mastering Day 2 Operations in SAP BTP: A Guide for Architects, Developers, and Administrators".

We hope to be able to welcome many of you live in our sessions!

entry.title: Re: What is the first item in the left hand-side navigati...
entry.content:
Thanks for the clarification.

As you say, the answer is "Subaccounts", which refers to the old version of the SAP BTP Cockpit (screenshot from the link you have given):

For information, the version 2024/2025 of BTP Cockpit has changed to this screen (the answer should then be "Account Explorer"), but the tutorial doesn't reflect this change:

For information, the error was reported January 2024, here: Take a Tour of SAP BTP Trial · Issue #23415 · sap-tutorials/Tutorials (and another one which is a duplicate: Step 5 of 'Take a Tour of SAP BTP Trial' is broken · Issue #23430 · sap-tutorials/Tutorials).

entry.title: Re: Will there be any impact if we change the field selec...
entry.content: No as ZNB have ZNBB field key -there would not any impact.

entry.title: scheduling unit tests
entry.content:
In the BTP ABAP environment, as far as I know, one may trigger unit tests in one of the following ways:

  • manually in Eclipse
  • with a pipeline on commit (project Piper?)
  • via external integration

but apparently NOT with a simple periodic job.

Do I understand this right? Either you have a full CI/CD setup or buy Homer Simpson's drinking bird? 😄

entry.title: How or can we back date completion of item A so that item B will assign based on that?
entry.content:
Item A as OTO (one time only)

Item B (with a 3 year retraining requirement) is setup as an ongoing item in a curriculum which has an assignment profile based on the completion of item A. (it only assigns once Item A is complete)

This is fine for any brand new assignments as it works as intended.

HOWEVER, we have some users that have taken Item A from 1 year or 2 years ago. And it seems that it will only assign Item B "in the now" (as of the date we execute/update users and assignments in the assignment profile)
Is there a way to setup the assignment of Item B to reflect the backdating/original date of item A, without having to go in manually and update records for all of those users?

entry.title: Re: Configure a Logo for your Cloud Application
entry.content:
Hello @tuliovargas ,
For this you can go to the tile :

After that you navigate to : this variables
COMPANY_LOGO_URL : to browse the link to your png file
COMPANY_LOGO_ACCESSIBLE_TEXT : the description for SEO referencing in the HTML

Click to Edit, On the top right of the page, now you can browse to your Company Logo.

Save and Refresh, You will be able to see the new Logo 😉

Hope it helps.

Regards,

Mehdi Bousba
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: SAP Rise IaaS have backup or not ?
entry.content:
The IAAS is infrastructure only, SAP will not provide any services on an IAAS server.

Customer needs to install and operate the server and install applications himself. 

Best Regards
Henrik Strange

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content: Thank you @MatthiasL for pointing this out - I have now fixed the link.

entry.title: Re: Go for your quick win! Migrate Identity Provisioning tenants to SAP Cloud Identity infrastructur
entry.content:
I am not clear on several points.

1.  What impact does this have to the existing IAS tenant set up, including corporate IDP's, groups, etc,?

2.  My understanding is that the IPS rules are more restrictive in cloud in the sf.user.filter, such as not being able to filter out multiple specific users.  Is there a place we can look for specific information on the filters?

3.  What is the biggest time determinant on how long this process will take?

entry.title: Re: Decode and Ifthenelse
entry.content: @AlexGG, we have set conditions for few EMPNO(1,2,3,4) for all other values it will return 'NO_ID' whatever the EMPNO, even if it is 5,6,7 or NULL.

entry.title: SAP Community Call for ALM – APJ edition
entry.content:
The monthly webinar - focusing on the APJ region and time zone - provides everything you need to know about SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) offerings. Get the latest news and regional updates directly from SAP's topic experts!

By attending this call you have the chance to stay updated about what's going on with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Focused Run.

For slides and recordings click here. 

Link to register is coming soon!

entry.title: Re: General Release of SAP Analytics Cloud compass
entry.content: This is excellent news! It's great to see SAC continuously evolving with enhanced functionality. However, it would be incredibly helpful if we also receive a comprehensive list of deprecated features to better prepare and adapt for these updates.

entry.title: Re: Inbound delivery in S4HANA goods receipt without EWM
entry.content:
Ideally in this case -- you can use 103-- GR block stock to indicate items are at Port-- if items are subject to Quality Management --(I assume this is outside the SAP system) then you can post 105 which received the items to your own storage.

You can explore inspection at Source functionality if you want to clear the goods before they hit your own stock.

entry.title: Re: LMS Story Report Access
entry.content:
Hi @siddhesh_chavan ,

When a user runs a Story report, it returns only the Learning data that the user can view in Learning portal.

LMS story reports can be shared with end users and they can view data based on permissions set in Learning application.

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Odata API for MSEG?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to perform an Odata API call that will query the MSEG table based on filter criteria like Movement Type, Material, Plant, Receiving Batch. Is there a standard API that would allow me to do this? Internet searching have suggested that I may need to create/expose an odata service based on the NSDM_E_MSEG. Please advise. Thank you!

entry.title: F4 help for Application Job in Public Cloud (2502 release)
entry.content:
A much-awaited feature of public cloud is now available with the 2502 release, with this feature we can attach a custom F4 value help to application job parameters, a basic yet essential feature.

Technical Details

Below are the steps on how we can attach F4 value help to application job parameters.

1) Create a class where all the business logic will be executed, this class will also contain all the job parameters.

To schedule an application job, you require an application job catalog entry that contains the name of the class (Class with execute method) which contains the interface IF_APJ_RT_RUN. You can create and edit application job catalog entries in the editor for application job catalog entries.

 

2) Creation of Application Job Catalog Entries

You can create an application job catalog entry in the ABAP development tools for Eclipse (ADT) using the creation wizard.

How to provide F4 to a parameter in application job

  • Create the above catalog entry for the field.
  • Select CDS view as value help type and provide the CDS view in the value help section.

Creation of Value help CDS

Create CDS view with below annotations and assign this view to a parameter of the corresponding job catalog. The application job framework uses these annotations to render the value help dialog and the CDS view to search, filter, and display the list of possible values.

  • @ObjectModel.dataCategory: #VALUE_HELP. This is a mandatory annotation for defining a CDS value help. Only CDS views with this annotation can be used in the application job framework.

Along with F4 help, now we can group the job parameters fields in different sections by creating different sections and groups.

Add Section and Group in catalog-->

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Add the group to each of the parameter 

Creation of Application Job Template

Create application job template and provide the catalog entry that was created in above steps

Application Job Fiori App to execute the job

User can select any value from the F4 that was attached in Job catalog to these fields.

Pretty easy right? Give it a try and let me know in the comments section whether this post was helpful. I will be creating more blogs on the new feature of public cloud that were introduced in the 2502 release.

Thanks

Abhi

We were testing it and we found out that the system let us delete the used category even when there still were some planned data and it did not issue any warning or error. entry.title: Re: BODS BOE scheduler failed to run with error: "Running...
entry.content: @mengzhnag, I did have the same issue and fixed it. In my case, there were 2 scripts in Data Services job. One would create a Directory another would move the files to the newly created directory. Since there was a directory already created with same name from previous year, the script was failing to run with error exit code 1. I created year wise directories and moved all the previous folders. Now job is not failing.

entry.title: Re: Using default connection string in production SAP B1
entry.content: Hello, why you need the second extension? You can have it all in only one addon...

Also in the functions, i can see GrandTotal function but not Subtotal. i'm i missing something? I also have Totals in my table, which is required for Subtotals as mentioned in documentation provided by SAP

Thanks,

Sumalini.

entry.title: Re: convert date format YYYY.MM.DD to YYYYMMDD
entry.content: @Cnuu, Yes, if you need YYYYMMDD format then you should use varchar datatype in your output field. You cannot use YYYYMMDD with date datatype.

entry.title: Re: Transaction VL10G - quantity of pallets - items with...
entry.content:
When you say order consists of 10 pallets, do you have packing instruction set in POP1 ? To answer your question, if any line item is set to Reason for Rejection and when you execute VL06G, system will only consider the open line items.  Having said that, in your case, the delivery will not have the two line items set to Reason for Rejection.
If that is not happening in your case, then, it must be due to incorrect custom code logic implemented for delivery creation

entry.title: Re: My ABAP in Eclipse wish list for 2025 enhancements / new features
entry.content:
• autocomplete for functions like line_exists, to_lower, ...
  • correct syntax highlighting for FINAL

entry.title: An RPA-Driven Solution for Managing Obsolete Contacts in C4C & ECC via CPI
entry.content:
Overview –

This article describes a solution to manage obsolete contacts in SAP Customer Experience (C4C) and SAP ERP (ECC) systems. The solution focuses on the specific challenge of handling obsolete contacts in ECC, which lacks an archiving flag.

To address this, the solution leverages C4C's Contact status change to trigger an Event notification to the RPA tool for name modification via CPI. Once the contact’s last name is updated in C4C, it then triggers a web service call to ECC.

This approach ensures that ECC contact last names reflect their obsolete status accurately, improving data quality and facilitating better contact management within the C4C & ECC system.

Reason - Lack of Archiving in ECC: ECC contacts do not have an explicit "archived" flag, making it difficult to identify and manage obsolete records effectively.

Prerequisites - SAP C4C, SAP CPI

Solution -

Step 1:  Set up Event Trigger in C4C - 

Creation of Event notification based on status change in SAP C4C system.
Navigate to Administrator, Under System Administration select “Event Notification”
Click on Add & mention the following details -

After save click on edit credentials for the authentication with CPI System. (Authentication - SSL Certificate or User ID Password Auth)

Once Credential are added, Navigate to Subscription and click on “Add”

Select the business object, Node, enable – field change
Add the details as below mentioned for Active to Obsolete

Create one more subscription for Obsolete to Active in the same way
Once both are added, Click on Actions --> Activate

Step 2: Data Transmission/Processing in CPI - 

Create a New Interface in CPI using http inbound from C4C and http outbound to RPA Tool.

1. JSON Payload (groovy script) – To parse the event payload to get the Contact UUID & also to add the auth token in header for RPA authentication.

 

 

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import com.sap.it.api.*
import com.sap.it.api.securestore.*
import groovy.json.*

def Message processData(Message message) {
    
    def secureStorageService =  ITApiFactory.getService(SecureStoreService.class, null)
    //To get the secure paramenter stored with the name C4CRPA
    def secureParameter = secureStorageService.getUserCredential("C4CRPA") 
    //store the token in apikey
    def apikey = secureParameter.getPassword().toString()
    //store it in header with name ApplicationAuthorization and use during RPA http call
    message.setHeader("ApplicationAuthorization", apikey) 
 
    def body = message.getBody(Reader) 
    def result = new JsonSlurper().parse(body)

    def contactid = result.data.Changes.nodeID[0]  
    message.setProperty("ContactUUID", contactid);
 
    return message;
}

 

How to store the authorization token in secure parameter in CPI and use it in HTTP Outbound adaptor – Click Here 

2. ODATA Call – Make a C4C ODATA call at Contact Collection using the Contact UUID to get the Contact ID, External System, First & Last Names, Status Code

3. Router – To check whether the Contact belongs to ECC or CRM

If the External system is ERP(ECC) – it will further send for processing

Else it will end the message

4. Content Modifier – To store contact id , status, last name in the property using XPath from the Odata payload.

5. RPA Payload creation (groovy script) – To create a payload structure using groovy script which will be accepted by the RPA tool.

 

 

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import com.sap.it.api.*
import com.sap.it.api.securestore.*
import groovy.json.*
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat


def Message processData(Message message) {
    
    def datetime = new SimpleDateFormat("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss").format(new Date())
    def external =  message.getProperty('ContactUUID') // get contact uuid from property
    def execoncate = external+'T'+datetime
    
    def propertiesmain = [
        "Status" : message.getProperty('status'),
        "ContactLastName" : message.getProperty('lastname'),
        "Description" : "B2B_C4C_Contact",        
        "ObjectID" : message.getProperty('ContactUUID'),
        "ContactID" : message.getProperty('ContactID')
    ]
    
    def externalRecords = [
        "externalId" : execoncate,
        "properties" : propertiesmain
        ]
    
    def body = [externalRecords]
    
    def properties = ["Name": "C4C"]
    def toolNodeInstance = [
        "toolName": "C4C_Automation","id": null,"properties":properties,"relatedToolInstance": null
    ]
    def properties1 = ["IgnioUpdate": "false"]
    def parentContext = ["id": null,"properties":properties1]

    def response = [
        "source": "RPAC4C",
        "toolNodeInstance": toolNodeInstance,
        "externalRecords":body,
        "parentContext" : parentContext
    ]
    message.setHeader('Content-Type','application/json')
    //pretty print the payload into json
    message.setBody((JsonOutput.prettyPrint(new JsonBuilder(response).toString())))
     
    return message;
}

 

 

Payload sent to RPA for Name Update (Json Payload) –

 

{
  "source": "RPAC4C",
  "toolNodeInstance": {
    "toolName": "C4C_Automation",
    "id": null,
    "properties": {
      "Name": "C4C"
    },
    "relatedToolInstance": null
  },
  "externalRecords": [
    {
      "externalId": "0522EC33704F1EEDB***************T01/09/2025 13:10:18",
      "properties": {
        "Status": "Obsolete",
        "ContactLastName": "Regression Testing",
        "Description": "B2B_C4C_Contact",
        "ObjectID": "0522EC33704F1EEDB***************",
        "ContactID": "1000000000"
      }
    }
  ],
  "parentContext": {
    "id": null,
    "properties": {
      "IgnioUpdate": "false"
    }
  }
}

 

 

 

Step 3: Creation of Communication arrangement/ system - 

For the RPA tool to make a POST ODATA call to C4C system to update the Last name with *del* prefix, it needs to authenticate with C4C system.
Hence, we create a communication system& arrangement and provide the User credentials to RPA for Authentication.

Creating Communication system –

 

After save – Set it as Active

Create a Communication Arrangement using scenario as “Odata for Business Object” with the same Communication system Instance ID

 

Step 4: RPA (Automation) Tool - 

Here Tool will receive the payload sent by CPI and it will update the contact's last name by adding/removing the "del" prefix based on the Status sent with payload.
For example: For this development we are using "IGNIO" as the automation tool.

Then this update is sent to C4C using POST ODATA call.

 

Step 5: Update to ECC - 

Once the contact’s last name is updated in C4C, it will automatically trigger a web service call to ECC where the contact’s name is also updated.

 

Conclusion

The implemented solution effectively addresses the challenge of managing obsolete ECC contacts by:

  1. Leveraging C4C Event Notification: Utilizing C4C event notification based on Contact status change as the primary trigger.
  2. Utilizing CPI and RPA: Integrating Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) and Automation Tool to create the payload and modify the name respectively.
  3. Modifying Contact Names: Adding/removing the "del" prefix to the contact's last name in C4C to visually distinguish obsolete contacts in ECC.
